title: Financial stability vulnerabilities remain elevated as geoeconomic shock unfolds
relevance: ECB explicit warning on systemic vulnerabilities during geoeconomic stress; critical for credit-equity dislocation monitoring in elevated-risk regime.

title: Swiss National Bank cuts interest rates by a half point to 0.5%
relevance: Central bank easing decision with direct credit and liquidity implications during elevated geoeconomic stress backdrop.

title: Fed's Powell says rate cut 'on the table' as soon as September
relevance: Forward guidance signalling potential Fed easing; tests thesis that credit markets may be underpricing recession risk if cuts arrive.
